description_long: This is a medium-sized, hardbound book with a worn, textured cover in a muted, dusty purple color. The front cover features a subtle embossed emblem resembling a sword with stylized wings, giving it a mysterious or possibly fantasy-themed appearance. The book's surface shows signs of age, with visible scuffs, stains, and some discoloration, especially near the edges and corners. The spine is plain, matching the cover's color and texture, and does not display any visible text or decorative elements. The back cover is unadorned, showing only the same aged, purple material. The pages are visible from the top and side, appearing yellowed and slightly uneven, consistent with an older, well-used book.
description: A worn, hardbound book with a dusty purple cover and an embossed sword-and-wings emblem on the front. The book shows signs of age and has no visible text or illustration beyond the emblem.
description_view_0: The front cover displays a purple, textured surface with an embossed sword-and-wings emblem and visible wear near the top edge.
description_view_1: The spine is plain, matching the cover's color and texture, with no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: The back cover is unadorned, showing only the aged, purple material with some scuffs and stains.
description_view_3: The page edges are visible, showing yellowed, slightly uneven paper, and the book's thickness is apparent.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features an embossed emblem of a sword with stylized wings, rendered in a subtle, low-relief style. There are no other illustrations or decorative elements visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is plain and matches the purple, worn texture of the cover, with no visible text or decorative elements.
